title: On Arnold's and Pushkin's puzzles
journal: Vladimir Arnold: Collected Works, vol.VII, Springer Nature, 2025, pp.497-500
journal_ref: Vladimir Arnold: Collected Works, vol.VII, Springer Nature, 2025, pp.497-500
abstract: We discuss and draw the reader's attention to several passages in Vladimir Arnold's note on the epigraph to the novel in verse "Evgenii Onegin" by A.S.Pushkin, as well as to puzzles hidden in the novel by the poet himself.
